trans-unit.resname: Active Member - Authenticated member and in an organ
trans-unit.source: Active Member - Authenticated member and in an organ
trans-unit.target: Actief lid - Geauthenticeerd lid en in een orgaan

trans-unit.resname: Administrators and board members must enable multi-factor authentication before accessing privileged pages. Confirm your password below to continue to the MFA setup screen.
trans-unit.source: Administrators and board members must enable multi-factor authentication before accessing privileged pages. Confirm your password below to continue to the MFA setup screen.
trans-unit.target: Beheerders en bestuursleden moeten tweestapsverificatie inschakelen voordat zij bevoegde pagina's kunnen openen. Bevestig hieronder je wachtwoord om door te gaan naar het instelscherm.

trans-unit.resname: All sessions - including this one - will be terminated immediately. You will be redirected to the login page.
trans-unit.source: All sessions - including this one - will be terminated immediately. You will be redirected to the login page.
trans-unit.target: Alle sessies - inclusief deze - worden onmiddellijk beëindigen. Je wordt doorgestuurd naar de inlogpagina.

trans-unit.resname: All sessions except this one will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.source: All sessions except this one will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.target: Alle sessies, behalve deze, worden onmiddellijk beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Are you sure you want to terminate the session on this device?
trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to terminate the session on this device?
trans-unit.target: Weet je zeker dat je de sessie op dit apparaat wilt beëindigen?

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes are shown only at generation time. Regenerate to obtain a new set.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes are shown only at generation time. Regenerate to obtain a new set.
trans-unit.target: Back-upcodes worden alleen weergegeven op het moment dat ze worden aangemaakt. Genereer ze opnieuw om een nieuwe set te krijgen.

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes have already been shown. Regenerate to get a new set.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes have already been shown. Regenerate to get a new set.
trans-unit.target: De back-upcodes zijn al weergegeven. Genereer nieuwe back-upcodes om een nieuwe set te krijgen.

trans-unit.resname: Backup codes regenerated. The previous codes are no longer valid.
trans-unit.source: Backup codes regenerated. The previous codes are no longer valid.
trans-unit.target: De back-upcodes zijn opnieuw gegenereerd. De vorige back-upcodes zijn niet langer geldig.

trans-unit.resname: Career Development and External Affairs Officer
trans-unit.source: Career Development and External Affairs Officer

trans-unit.resname: Devices where your account is currently signed in. If you notice an unrecognised device or location, terminate that session immediately and consider changing your password.
trans-unit.source: Devices where your account is currently signed in. If you notice an unrecognised device or location, terminate that session immediately and consider changing your password.
trans-unit.target: Apparaten waarop je momenteel bent ingelogd. Als je een onbekend apparaat of een onbekende locatie opmerkt, beëindig dan onmiddellijk die sessie af en overweeg om je wachtwoord te wijzigen.

trans-unit.resname: Disable MFA on your account? Your existing TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded.
trans-unit.source: Disable MFA on your account? Your existing TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded.
trans-unit.target: Wil je MFA voor je account uitschakelen? Je huidige TOTP-code en back-upcodes worden dan verwijderd.

trans-unit.resname: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.source: Enter a 6-digit authenticator code or a 16-character lowercase-hex backup code.
trans-unit.target: Voer een 6-cijferige verificatiecode of een 16-tekens lange back-upcode in kleine letters (hexadecimaal) in.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your saved backup codes.
trans-unit.source: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your saved backup codes.
trans-unit.target: Voer de 6-cijferige code in die je in je authenticator-app hebt ontvangen, of een van je opgeslagen back-upcodes.

trans-unit.resname: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm the link.
trans-unit.source: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm the link.
trans-unit.target: Voer de 6-cijferige code in die in de app wordt weergegeven om de koppeling te bevestigen.

trans-unit.resname: Every active session for this user will be terminated immediately.
trans-unit.source: Every active session for this user will be terminated immediately.
trans-unit.target: Alle actieve sessies van deze gebruiker worden direct beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Every input should map to an output. This one got lost.
trans-unit.source: Every input should map to an output. This one got lost.
trans-unit.target: Elke invoer moet een uitvoer als beeld hebben. Deze is verloren gegaan.

trans-unit.resname: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password and a verification code. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.source: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password and a verification code. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Voor jouw veiligheid moet je bij gevoelige handelingen opnieuw je wachtwoord en een verificatiecode invoeren. Deze bevestiging blijft 10 minuten geldig.

trans-unit.resname: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.source: For your protection, sensitive actions require you to re-enter your password. This confirmation stays active for 10 minutes.
trans-unit.target: Voor jouw veiligheid moet je bij gevoelige handelingen opnieuw je wachtwoord invoeren. Deze bevestiging blijft 10 minuten geldig.

trans-unit.resname: GEWIS uses functional cookies to make the website function and analytical cookies to provide you with an optimal user experience. If you do not want analytical cookies, you can opt out below.
trans-unit.source: GEWIS uses functional cookies to make the website function and analytical cookies to provide you with an optimal user experience. If you do not want analytical cookies, you can opt out below.
trans-unit.target: GEWIS gebruikt functionele cookies om de website te laten functioneren en analytische cookies om u een optimale gebruikerservaring te bieden. Als u geen analytische cookies wilt, kunt u zich hieronder afmelden.

trans-unit.resname: Guest - Anyone who can access the website
trans-unit.source: Guest - Anyone who can access the website
trans-unit.target: Gast - Iedereen die toegang heeft tot de website

trans-unit.resname: If there is an account associated with your email address, an email has just been sent containing a link that will allow you to reset your password. If you do not receive an email, please check your spam folder or try again later.
trans-unit.source: If there is an account associated with your email address, an email has just been sent containing a link that will allow you to reset your password. If you do not receive an email, please check your spam folder or try again later.
trans-unit.target: Als er een account aan jouw e-mailadres is gekoppeld, is er zojuist een e-mail verzonden met een link waarmee je jouw wachtwoord kunt resetten. Als je geen e-mail ontvangt, controleer dan jouw spamfolder of probeer het later nog eens.

trans-unit.resname: If this keeps occurring, please contact the Application Management Committee and let us know what you were doing when this error occurred. We will fix it as soon as possible.
trans-unit.source: If this keeps occurring, please contact the Application Management Committee and let us know what you were doing when this error occurred. We will fix it as soon as possible.
trans-unit.target: Als deze fout zich blijft voordoen, neem dan contact op met de ApplicatieBeheerCommissie en laat ons weten wat je aan het doen was toen deze fout optrad. We zullen het zo snel mogelijk oplossen.

trans-unit.resname: If you entered a backup code, try the next unused one from your saved list. Each backup code works only once.
trans-unit.source: If you entered a backup code, try the next unused one from your saved list. Each backup code works only once.
trans-unit.target: Als je een back-upcode hebt ingevoerd, probeer dan de volgende ongebruikte back-upcode uit je lijst met opgeslagen back-upcodes. Elke back-upcode kan maar één keer worden gebruikt.

trans-unit.resname: Improve security by signing out of other devices.
trans-unit.source: Improve security by signing out of other devices.
trans-unit.target: Verhoog de veiligheid door je op andere apparaten af te melden.

trans-unit.resname: Install an authenticator app such as Ente Auth or 2FAS on your phone.
trans-unit.source: Install an authenticator app such as Ente Auth or 2FAS on your phone.
trans-unit.target: Installeer een authenticatie-app zoals Ente Auth of 2FAS op je telefoon.

trans-unit.resname: It exists only in the complex plane of wishful thinking.
trans-unit.source: It exists only in the complex plane of wishful thinking.
trans-unit.target: Het bestaat alleen in het complexe vlak van wensdenken.

trans-unit.resname: It is getting closer... but it will never quite get there.
trans-unit.source: It is getting closer... but it will never quite get there.
trans-unit.target: Het komt steeds dichterbij... maar het zal er nooit helemaal komen.

trans-unit.resname: It is pointing somewhere. Just not here.
trans-unit.source: It is pointing somewhere. Just not here.
trans-unit.target: Het verwijst ergens naar. Alleen niet hier.

trans-unit.resname: It was declared, but never initialised.
trans-unit.source: It was declared, but never initialised.
trans-unit.target: Het werd gedeclareerd, maar nooit geïnitialiseerd.

trans-unit.resname: Log in to view the subscribers.
trans-unit.source: Log in to view the subscribers.
trans-unit.target: Log in om de inschrijvingen te bekijken.

trans-unit.resname: MFA enabled. Save your backup codes now - they will not be shown again.
trans-unit.source: MFA enabled. Save your backup codes now - they will not be shown again.
trans-unit.target: MFA is ingeschakeld. Sla je back-upcodes nu op - ze worden daarna niet meer weergegeven.

trans-unit.resname: MFA reset and all sessions terminated.
trans-unit.source: MFA reset and all sessions terminated.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie hersteld en alle sessies beëindigd.

trans-unit.resname: Made with <3 by the ApplicatieBeheerCommissie and Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).
trans-unit.source: Made with <3 by the ApplicatieBeheerCommissie and Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).
trans-unit.target: Met <3 gemaakt door de ApplicatieBeheerCommissie en Web Commissie (2013 - 2022).

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication adds a second step at login: in addition to your password, you enter a time-based code from an authenticator app.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication adds a second step at login: in addition to your password, you enter a time-based code from an authenticator app.
trans-unit.target: Bij multi-factor authenticatie wordt er een tweede stap toegevoegd bij het inloggen: naast je wachtwoord voer je een tijdgebonden code in uit een authenticatie-app.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication cannot be disabled while it is required for your role.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication cannot be disabled while it is required for your role.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie kan niet worden uitgeschakeld zolang deze voor jouw rol verplicht is.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled for this user.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication is not enabled for this user.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie is niet ingeschakeld voor deze gebruiker.

trans-unit.resname: Multi-factor authentication is required for your role. Privileged actions are unavailable until you enable it.
trans-unit.source: Multi-factor authentication is required for your role. Privileged actions are unavailable until you enable it.
trans-unit.target: Tweestapsverificatie is verplicht voor jouw rol. Bevoegde acties zijn niet beschikbaar totdat je het inschakelt.

trans-unit.resname: No activities match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No activities match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen activiteiten voldoen aan de huidige filters.

trans-unit.resname: No company users match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No company users match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen bedrijfsgebruikers voldoen aan de huidige filters.

trans-unit.resname: No members match the current filters.
trans-unit.source: No members match the current filters.
trans-unit.target: Geen leden voldoen aan de huidige filters.
Oh nee! Er is iets misgegaan :(

trans-unit.resname: On Thursdays, there is a %link_start%social drink%link_end% from 16.30 to 19.00.
trans-unit.source: On Thursdays, there is a %link_start%social drink%link_end% from 16.30 to 19.00.
trans-unit.target: Donderdags is er een %link_start%borrel%link_end% van 16.30 tot 19.00.

trans-unit.resname: Or enter this secret in your app manually:
trans-unit.source: Or enter this secret in your app manually:
trans-unit.target: Of voer deze geheime sleutel handmatig in je app in:

trans-unit.resname: Pick a long, unique password - at least 16 characters and not found in any known data breach.
trans-unit.source: Pick a long, unique password - at least 16 characters and not found in any known data breach.
trans-unit.target: Kies een lang, uniek wachtwoord - minimaal 16 tekens lang en niet voorkomend in bekende datalekken.

trans-unit.resname: Please contact %organizer% or the board (%email%) with any questions or concerns. Have fun!
trans-unit.source: Please contact %organizer% or the board (%email%) with any questions or concerns. Have fun!
trans-unit.target: Neem contact op met %organizer% of het bestuur (%email%) bij vragen of opmerkingen. Veel plezier!

trans-unit.resname: Reality collapsed. Please go back before the singularity spreads.
trans-unit.source: Reality collapsed. Please go back before the singularity spreads.
trans-unit.target: De werkelijkheid stortte in. Ga alsjeblieft terug voordat de singulariteit zich verspreidt.

trans-unit.resname: Regenerate backup codes? Any codes you previously saved will stop working.
trans-unit.source: Regenerate backup codes? Any codes you previously saved will stop working.
trans-unit.target: Back-upcodes opnieuw genereren? Alle back-upcodes die je eerder hebt opgeslagen, werken dan niet meer.

trans-unit.resname: Save them now: write them down, print this page, or store them in a secure place. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. When you regenerate, all previous codes are invalidated.
trans-unit.source: Save them now: write them down, print this page, or store them in a secure place. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. When you regenerate, all previous codes are invalidated.
trans-unit.target: Bewaar ze nu: schrijf ze op, druk deze pagina af of bewaar ze op een veilige plek. Elke code kan één keer worden gebruikt voor het geval je geen toegang meer hebt tot je authenticator-app. Wanneer je nieuwe codes genereert, worden alle eerdere codes ongeldig.

trans-unit.resname: Search by company, representative name, or email
trans-unit.source: Search by company, representative name, or email
trans-unit.target: Zoek op bedrijf, vertegenwoordiger of e-mail

trans-unit.resname: Search by name or membership number
trans-unit.source: Search by name or membership number

trans-unit.resname: Segmentation fault while accessing this page
trans-unit.source: Segmentation fault while accessing this page
trans-unit.target: Segmentatiefout bij het openen van deze pagina

trans-unit.resname: TOTP-based MFA is active on your account.
trans-unit.source: TOTP-based MFA is active on your account.
trans-unit.target: MFA op basis van TOTP is ingeschakeld voor je account.

trans-unit.resname: TU/e Guest - Anyone who can access the website from within the TU/e
trans-unit.source: TU/e Guest - Anyone who can access the website from within the TU/e
trans-unit.target: TU/e gast - Iedereen die toegang heeft tot de website vanuit de TU/e

trans-unit.resname: That device will be signed out immediately.
trans-unit.source: That device will be signed out immediately.

trans-unit.resname: The GEWIS website is open-source! Check out the repository on  GitHub. Or visit our organisation for more of our awesome open-source projects.
trans-unit.source: The GEWIS website is open-source! Check out the repository on  GitHub. Or visit our organisation for more of our awesome open-source projects.
trans-unit.target: De GEWIS-website is open source! Bekijk de repository op  GitHub. Of bezoek onze organisatie voor meer van onze geweldige open-sourceprojecten.

trans-unit.resname: Their TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded and every active session for the user will be terminated. Use this when a device has been lost or compromised.
trans-unit.source: Their TOTP secret and backup codes will be discarded and every active session for the user will be terminated. Use this when a device has been lost or compromised.
trans-unit.target: Hun TOTP-geheim en back-upcodes worden weggegooid en alle actieve sessies van de gebruiker worden beëindigd. Gebruik dit wanneer een apparaat verloren of gecompromitteerd is.

trans-unit.resname: This is the only time these codes will be shown.
trans-unit.source: This is the only time these codes will be shown.
trans-unit.target: Dit is de enige keer dat deze codes worden weergegeven.

trans-unit.resname: This page has been divided by zero
trans-unit.source: This page has been divided by zero
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is gedeeld door nul

trans-unit.resname: This page is NP-hard to locate
trans-unit.source: This page is NP-hard to locate
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is NP-hard te vinden

trans-unit.resname: This page is a dangling pointer
trans-unit.source: This page is a dangling pointer
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina is een dangling pointer

trans-unit.resname: This page is asymptotically approaching existence
trans-unit.source: This page is asymptotically approaching existence
trans-unit.target: Deze pagina nadert asymptotisch zijn bestaan

trans-unit.resname: We found a pointer to NULL instead of this page
trans-unit.source: We found a pointer to NULL instead of this page
trans-unit.target: We hebben een verwijzing naar NULL gevonden in plaats van deze pagina

trans-unit.resname: Welcome to the website of study association GEWIS, the study association of the department of Mathematics & Computer Science at Eindhoven University of Technology.
trans-unit.source: Welcome to the website of study association GEWIS, the study association of the department of Mathematics & Computer Science at Eindhoven University of Technology.
trans-unit.target: Welkom op de website van studievereniging GEWIS, de studievereniging van de faculteit Wiskunde & Informatica aan de Technische Universiteit Eindhoven.

trans-unit.resname: Which is basically the same thing.
trans-unit.source: Which is basically the same thing.

trans-unit.resname: You are about to reset multi-factor authentication for:
trans-unit.source: You are about to reset multi-factor authentication for:
trans-unit.target: Je staat op het punt om tweestapsverificatie te resetten voor:
Je doet je nu voor als %name% (%lidnr%)!

trans-unit.resname: You are currently using administrator privileges to use the website!
trans-unit.source: You are currently using administrator privileges to use the website!
trans-unit.target: Je gebruikt momenteel beheerdersprivileges om de website te gebruiken!

trans-unit.resname: You assumed it was here. It was not. Q.E.D.
trans-unit.source: You assumed it was here. It was not. Q.E.D.
trans-unit.target: Je ging ervan uit dat het hier was. Dat was niet zo. Q.E.D.

trans-unit.resname: You cannot sign in to this account at this moment. Contact the board for more information.
trans-unit.source: You cannot sign in to this account at this moment. Contact the board for more information.
trans-unit.target: Je kunt je op dit moment niet aanmelden met dit account. Neem contact op met het bestuur voor meer informatie.

trans-unit.resname: You currently sign in with only a password. Adding MFA significantly reduces the risk of account takeover.
trans-unit.source: You currently sign in with only a password. Adding MFA significantly reduces the risk of account takeover.
trans-unit.target: Momenteel logt je alleen in met een wachtwoord. Door MFA toe te voegen, wordt het risico op accountmisbruik aanzienlijk verkleind.

trans-unit.resname: You do not have the required privileges to perform this action.
trans-unit.source: You do not have the required privileges to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt niet de vereiste rechten om deze actie uit te voeren.

trans-unit.resname: You have sent too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
trans-unit.source: You have sent too many requests in a short period of time. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt in korte tijd te veel verzoeken verzonden. Wacht een paar minuten voordat je het opnieuw probeert.

trans-unit.resname: You tried to access memory outside the bounds of reality.
trans-unit.source: You tried to access memory outside the bounds of reality.
trans-unit.target: Je hebt geprobeerd om geheugen buiten de grenzen van de werkelijkheid te benaderen.

trans-unit.resname: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
trans-unit.source: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
trans-unit.target: Je wachtwoord is opnieuw ingesteld. Je kunt je nu aanmelden met je nieuwe wachtwoord.

trans-unit.resname: Your password-reset link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.source: Your password-reset link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
trans-unit.target: De link om je wachtwoord opnieuw in te stellen is verlopen of is al gebruikt. Vraag een nieuwe aan.

trans-unit.resname: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
trans-unit.source: Your session was ended for security reasons. Please sign in again.
trans-unit.target: Je sessie is om veiligheidsredenen beëindigd. Log opnieuw in.
